---
description: "Use when implementing frontend pages/components and user interaction behavior in Next.js app routes and feature components."
applyTo: "10badv/src/app/**/page.js, 10badv/src/app/**/layout.js, 10badv/src/features/**/*.js, 10badv/src/shared/**/*.js"
---
# Frontend Instructions

- Prefer server components by default; add `'use client';` only when needed.
- Follow existing design system guidance and accessibility-first semantic markup.
- Keep responsive behavior mobile-first.
- Add/maintain user-centric tests for changed behavior.
